channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Indian Rupee Declines to All-Time Low Amid Rising Oil Prices and Global Uncertainty
item.description: On May 18, 2026, the Indian rupee opened weak and touched an all-time low of 96.25 against the U.S. dollar during early trade, marking a fall of 44 paise from its previous close. Analysts attribute th...

item.title: Senate prepares to convene impeachment court amid leadership uncertainty
item.description: The Philippine Senate is scheduled to convene as an impeachment court on May 18, 2026, to hear the case against Vice President Sara Duterte. This comes after a recent leadership shakeup in the Senate,...

item.title: Idac confirms no arrest warrant issued for KZN police commissioner Mkhwanazi
item.description: The Investigating Directorate Against Corruption (Idac) has clarified that no warrant of arrest has been issued against KwaZulu-Natal police commissioner Lt-Gen Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi. This statement foll...

item.title: Plug-in solar panels to be sold in UK supermarkets with safety and planning considerations
item.description: Plug-in solar panels are expected to become available in the UK in the coming months, with prices around £500. These panels can be mounted on balconies or in gardens and connect to the home through an...

item.title: Karen Nyamu Shows Pride as Daughter Taraja Wairimu Excels in School Sports Day
item.description: Senator Karen Nyamu recently shared touching moments from a school sports day, proudly supporting her daughter, Taraja Wairimu, during the events. The young Wairimu, affectionately called Nimu, compet...

item.title: Transport Sector Declares Nationwide Strike Over Rising Fuel Costs
item.description: On Monday, May 18, 2026, Kenyan newspapers widely reported that matatu operators and other stakeholders in the transport sector have declared a nationwide strike in protest against the recent increase...

item.title: Two Police Personnel Killed in Dumper Truck Collision on M9 Motorway
item.description: On Monday, a tragic incident occurred on the M9 Motorway near Karachi, resulting in the death of two police personnel. According to officials from Malir police, a police van assigned for patrolling an...

item.title: Kylie Minogue opens up in Netflix documentary about her career and personal life
item.description: Kylie Minogue’s new three-part Netflix documentary, KYLIE, offers an intimate look at the pop star’s life, tracing her journey from a young Australian soap star to international music icon. The series...

item.title: Makinde-backed PDP plans nationwide screening of 3,181 2027 election aspirants
item.description: A faction of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) wey dey supported by Oyo State Governor, Seyi Makinde, don announce say dem go screen total of 3,181 aspirants for 2027 general elections come Tuesday. ...

item.title: Analysis of Potential European Escalation in the Russia-Ukraine Conflict
item.description: The article discusses the escalating conflict between Russia and NATO, particularly focusing on the risk that the war in Ukraine could spread directly to European countries in 2026. It argues that Eur...

item.title: Stay Free Alberta appeals ruling that rejected their separation petition
item.description: Stay Free Alberta, an advocacy group based in Alberta, has filed an appeal challenging the recent Court of King’s Bench decision that struck down their petition seeking separation from the province. T...

item.title: Aaron Rai becomes first English winner of US PGA Championship since 1919
item.description: England's Aaron Rai made history at the US PGA Championship at Aronimink, claiming his first major title. The 31-year-old became the first Englishman in over a century to lift the Wanamaker Trophy, th...

item.title: Arkansas Man Arrested for Threatening Walmart Shooting Over Hantavirus Concerns
item.description: Aaron Bynum, a 20-year-old man from Oakland, Arkansas, was arrested after allegedly threatening to carry out a mass shooting at a local Walmart if the country went into lockdown due to a hantavirus ou...

item.title: Tribal Chief and Two Others Killed in Wana IED Explosion
item.description: In a tragic incident on Monday morning, an improvised explosive device (IED) detonated in the bustling Rustam Bazaar area of Wana, resulting in the deaths of three people, including Malik Tariq Wazir,...

item.title: Bulgaria Claims First Eurovision Victory Amid Boycotts Over Israel Participation
item.description: Bulgaria won the 70th Eurovision Song Contest held in Vienna, Austria, with Dara performing the song 'Bangaranga.' This marks Bulgaria's first-ever win in the contest, which featured 25 acts following...

item.title: Jannik Sinner Wins Italian Open, Secures €1m and Golden Masters
item.description: Jannik Sinner don make history as e win the Italian Open on Sunday, beating Casper Ruud 6-4, 6-4. With this win, Sinner don secure him sixth consecutive Masters 1000 tournament title and bag €1,007,16...

item.title: Vehicle flips on its side in North York collision; no serious injuries reported
item.description: A vehicle flipped onto its side after a collision in North York on May 17, 2026. Fortunately, authorities report that no one sustained serious injuries as a result of the incident. Emergency services ...

item.title: Durban residents challenge municipal approvals over noisy padel courts
item.description: In Durban’s Morningside suburb, residents are taking legal action against the noise generated by nearby padel courts at the NMJ Islamic Centre. Usha Neerpath and Naseer Abdullah say the constant thud ...

item.title: Zipf’s Law and the Hidden Inequalities in South Africa’s Urban Landscape
item.description: In South Africa, applying Zipf’s Law to the country’s urban hierarchy gives a misleading impression of spatial and economic normality. Zipf’s Law, which predicts a smooth rank-size distribution among ...

item.title: Cubana Chief Priest Explains Why He Didn’t Contest APC Primaries in Imo
item.description: Okechukwu Pascal, wey people sabi as Cubana Chief Priest, don talk finally about di APC House of Representatives primaries for Orsu/Orlu/Oru East Federal Constituency for Imo State. E clear say e volu...
